message.content:
This session is being continued from a previous conversation that ran out of context. The summary below covers the earlier portion of the conversation.

Summary:
1. Primary Request and Intent:
   Building the 점점 (Dotton) iOS diary app from scratch. The app fills calendar day-circles as users record daily entries, forming a pixel-art image each month. The user wants to develop screen-by-screen, starting with tech stack confirmation, then Phase 1 Foundation, then Phase 2-1 (calendar grid). The user explicitly requested: no tab bar, Firebase deferred to last phase, screen development one at a time with direct instruction per phase. The user has just provided complete Phase 2-1 UI specs and the assistant started implementing (only one file changed before summary was triggered).

2. Key Technical Concepts:
   - **Swift / SwiftUI** — iOS platform
   - **TCA (The Composable Architecture) 1.17+** — `@Reducer` macro, `@ObservableState`, `@DependencyClient`
   - **SwiftData** — `@Model` for `Diary`, ModelContainer in DottonApp
   - **PBXFileSystemSynchronizedRootGroup** — Xcode 26 feature; all files in `Dotton/` folder auto-included in build target (no manual pbxproj file registration needed)
   - **`@unchecked Sendable`** — Required on `Diary` (`@Model` class) to satisfy TCA's `@Sendable` closure requirements
   - **Sunday-start calendar grid** — weekday header "일월화수목금토"; `firstWeekdayOffset = weekday - 1`
   - **Monday-start → Sunday-start** — Changed in `Date+Helpers.swift`
   - **PostScript font names** — Used in `Font.custom()`, differ from filenames
   - **Info.plist at project root** — Moved outside `Dotton/` to avoid "Multiple commands produce" conflict with file system sync group
   - **`GENERATE_INFOPLIST_FILE = NO`** + `INFOPLIST_FILE = Info.plist` — Set in pbxproj
   - **Swift Charts** — For statistics (Phase 5, no 3rd party needed)

3. Files and Code Sections:

   - **`/Users/user/Desktop/Dotton/CLAUDE.md`**
     - Project spec: app overview, tech stack, screen structure

   - **`/Users/user/Desktop/Dotton/Dotton/DottonApp.swift`**
     - Currently simplified (no TCA store yet — removed after circular reference error)
     - Needs update in Phase 2-1 to use AppFeature store
     ```swift
     import SwiftUI
     import SwiftData
     @main
     struct DottonApp: App {
         var body: some Scene {
             WindowGroup { AppView() }
             .modelContainer(for: Diary.self)
         }
     }
     ```

   - **`/Users/user/Desktop/Dotton/Dotton/Core/Models/Diary.swift`**
     - SwiftData `@Model`, `@unchecked Sendable` for TCA compatibility
     ```swift
     @Model
     final class Diary: @unchecked Sendable {
         var id: UUID
         var date: Date
         var achievementAnswer: String
         var gratitudeAnswer: String
         var freeAnswer: String
         var keywords: [String]  // DiscoveryKeyword raw values
         var createdAt: Date
         var discoveryKeywords: [DiscoveryKeyword] { keywords.compactMap { DiscoveryKeyword(rawValue: $0) } }
     }
     ```

   - **`/Users/user/Desktop/Dotton/Dotton/Core/Models/DiscoveryKeyword.swift`**
     - 15 keywords across 3 sections (성장/성취, 연결, 자기돌봄)
     - Note: user changed `DiscoverySection.growth` rawValue from "성장/성취" to "성취"

   - **`/Users/user/Desktop/Dotton/Dotton/Core/Models/MonthlyTheme.swift`**
     ```swift
     struct MonthlyTheme {
         var year: Int
         var month: Int
         var sentence: String
         var emoji: String
         var pictureTitle: String   // display text shown at completion (NOT asset name)
         var primaryColor: Color
         var secondaryColor: Color
         var pixelArtCells: [PixelArtCell]
     }
     ```

   - **`/Users/user/Desktop/Dotton/Dotton/Core/Models/PixelArtCell.swift`**
     ```swift
     struct PixelArtCell: Equatable {
         var gridIndex: Int        // 0-based position in 7×N grid
         var backgroundColor: Color
         var textColor: Color
         var text: String?
         var imageName: String?    // Xcode asset name for image cells
     }
     ```

   - **`/Users/user/Desktop/Dotton/Dotton/Core/Clients/DiaryClient.swift`**
     - TCA `@DependencyClient`; all methods are stub (Phase 3 implementation pending)
     ```swift
     @DependencyClient
     struct DiaryClient: Sendable {
         var fetchDiaries: @Sendable (_ month: Date) async throws -> [Diary] = { _ in [] }
         var fetchDiary: @Sendable (_ date: Date) async throws -> Diary? = { _ in nil }
         var saveDiary: @Sendable (_ diary: Diary) async throws -> Void
         var deleteDiary: @Sendable (_ diary: Diary) async throws -> Void
     }
     extension DependencyValues {
         var diaryClient: DiaryClient { get { self[DiaryClient.self] } set { ... } }
     }
     ```

   - **`/Users/user/Desktop/Dotton/Dotton/Core/Extensions/Date+Helpers.swift`**
     - **Just updated**: changed `firstWeekdayOffset` to Sunday-start
     ```swift
     var firstWeekdayOffset: Int {
         let weekday = Calendar.current.component(.weekday, from: startOfMonth)
         // 1=일(Sun)..7=토(Sat) → Sun=0, Mon=1, ..., Sat=6
         return weekday - 1
     }
     var startOfMonth: Date { ... }
     var endOfMonth: Date { ... }
     var daysInMonth: Int { ... }
     var calendarGridCount: Int { ... }  // rounds up to multiple of 7
     var monthYear: String { ... }
     func isSameDay(as other: Date) -> Bool { ... }
     ```

   - **`/Users/user/Desktop/Dotton/Dotton/Core/Extensions/Color+Hex.swift`**
     ```swift
     extension Color {
         init(hex: String) { /* supports 6 and 8 char hex */ }
     }
     ```

   - **`/Users/user/Desktop/Dotton/Dotton/Core/Data/MonthlyThemeData.swift`**
     - 12 months hardcoded: 2026 Apr–Dec, 2027 Jan–Mar
     - Helper functions `cell()` and `imageCell()` for building PixelArtCells
     - `MonthlyTheme.all` array ordered chronologically (Apr 2026 → Mar 2027)
     - Each theme has: sentence, emoji, pictureTitle, primaryColor, secondaryColor, pixelArtCells
     - May(5월) and August(8월) have 42 cells (6 rows); others have 35 cells (5 rows)
     - Note: 3월 data was modified by user (changed some colors, e.g. AF9989→F2E5D0, fixed cell 28 text)

   - **`/Users/user/Desktop/Dotton/Dotton/Utils/Fonts/Font+Custom.swift`**
     ```swift
     extension Font {
         static func gulim(_ size: CGFloat) -> Font { .custom("TTGulimB", size: size) }
         static func meetme(_ size: CGFloat) -> Font { .custom("Ownglyph_meetme-Rg", size: size) }
         static func yeongdeokSea(_ size: CGFloat) -> Font { .custom("Yeongdeok Sea", size: size) }
     }
     ```
     Font files renamed: `210Gulim.ttf`, `meetme.ttf`, `yeongdeokSea.ttf` (in `Utils/Fonts/`)

   - **`/Users/user/Desktop/Dotton/Info.plist`** (at project root, NOT inside Dotton/)
     - Contains `UIAppFonts` array with 3 font filenames
     - `GENERATE_INFOPLIST_FILE = NO`, `INFOPLIST_FILE = Info.plist` in pbxproj

   - **`/Users/user/Desktop/Dotton/Dotton/Features/AppFeature/AppFeature.swift`**
     - Currently just a comment placeholder (Phase 2 will fill this)

   - **`/Users/user/Desktop/Dotton/Dotton/Features/AppFeature/AppView.swift`**
     - Currently placeholder showing "점점" text, no TCA store

4. Errors and fixes:
   - **`@Reducer` circular reference** — `AppFeature` with empty `Action` enum caused macro expansion circular reference. Fixed by removing all TCA code from AppFeature (just a comment) and making AppView/DottonApp TCA-free for Phase 1.
   - **`Diary` not Sendable** — TCA `@DependencyClient` closures require `Sendable` parameters. Fixed by adding `@unchecked Sendable` to `Diary` class (safe because `@Model` is MainActor-bound).
   - **`import Dependencies` fails** — Only `ComposableArchitecture` product is added; `Dependencies` isn't separately importable. Removed the import.
   - **Multiple commands produce Info.plist** — `PBXFileSystemSynchronizedRootGroup` auto-includes `Info.plist` as resource AND the build system processes it as Info.plist. Fixed by moving Info.plist outside `Dotton/` to project root.
   - **MissedDayPreview.swift errors** — Created a preview file that had `Color(hex:)` label issue and `UIColor` not in scope. User asked to delete it; file was removed.
   - **replace_all replaced wrong occurrences** — When renaming `imageName` to `pictureTitle` in MonthlyThemeData.swift, it also replaced `imageName` inside the `imageCell()` helper function. Fixed by reverting those specific lines.

5. Problem Solving:
   - Confirmed `PBXFileSystemSynchronizedRootGroup` means no manual file registration needed in pbxproj — all files in `Dotton/` folder are auto-compiled.
   - SwiftData + TCA coexistence: Using stub DiaryClient for Phase 1-2, real implementation in Phase 3. `Diary: @unchecked Sendable` solves the Sendable boundary issue.
   - Font PostScript names extracted via Python script from TTF binary name tables.
   - Decided against JSON for hardcoded theme data (Color type not serializable; data never changes at runtime).

6. All user messages:
   - "CLAUDE.md에다가 [앱 개요]... 이 내용 좀 넣어줄래?"
   - "/plan" — requested plan mode
   - "이 앱을 만들때 어떤식으로 작업할지 계획 세워봐. 화면 하나씩 개발했으면 좋겠고, 우선 처음에는 기술 스택부터 확정하고 갔으면 좋겠어"
   - "좋아. 근데 내가 plan을 수행하면 너가 모든 단계를 한번에 구현하는 구조야?"
   - (selected "직접 지시" for execution style)
   - "음 응 근데 Tab을 따로 두는 구조는 아니라서. 탭은 안 둬도 될 것 같고, firebase는 필수 기능은 아니라 맨 마지막 phase로 따로 빼줘."
   - "통계 화면이랑 공유 기능은 메인 화면 상단 우측에 버튼이 있어. 그리고 일기 작성은 원 탭으로 진입하는거 맞아"
   - "Phase1 실행해줘"
   - "추가 완." (TCA SPM added)
   - "지금 빌드 실패나는거 고쳐봐."
   - "DiaryEntry -> 이름 이상함.. entry ?? 무슨 뜻인지 잘 안 와닿음 / answer1,2,3 이렇게 하면.. 나중에 질문 순서 바뀌면 애매해짐 / PixelArtCell에서 dayNumber가 애매한게…"
   - "ㅇㅇ Diary로 깔끔하게 갈게"
   - "음 응 근데 Tab을 따로..." (repeated navigation clarification)
   - [Provided full 12-month pixel art data]
   - "아맞다. 이게 년도마다도 그림이 달라질거라... 4월~12월은 2026년, 1~3월은 2027년으로 해줄 수 있어?"
   - "ㅇㅇ 근데 pictureKeyword랑 sentence랑 겹치는데 하나만 유지해도 될것 같고, imageName은 내가 불러줄게. 이모지도 하나씩 할당할라하는데 그것도 내가 불러주면 될까"
   - [Provided emoji and pictureTitle for all 12 months]
   - "아 근데 imageName이라는 작명이 좀 헷갈리나? 저걸로 이미지를 찾는게 아니고, 저건 그림 완성되었을 때 유저한테 보여주는 텍스트야"
   - "굿. phase2 하기 전에 내가 전달해줘야 하는 정보 있어?"
   - "phase 2를 두단계로 나누자. phase2-1, 2-2 이렇게. 달력 부분이랑 아래 하단 노트를 각각 나누자"
   - "잠깐만. 그 전에.. 지금 이게 달력 셀 ui인데, 기록을 안하고 지나간 날에 대해서 어떤 식으로 표현하면 좋을까?" [with screenshots]
   - "흠 .. 근데 투명도 차이는 ... 별로 채감이 안될 것 같아. 애초에 그림이 투명도가 다른 것들이 있어서. 여러개 그림으로 그려서 보여줄 수 있어?"
   - "너가 추가한 파일 삭제해" (re: MissedDayPreview.swift)
   - "깨진 느낌 UI는? 세개다 줘봐. localhost로 html 파일 주는건 안돼? 피그마에 넣어서 보려고"
   - "이제 phase2-1 질문 답할까? 질문이 뭐였지?"
   - [Very detailed Phase 2-1 specs — circle sizes, states, weekday header, month header, buttons, background color, etc.]
   - "잠깐만. 그 전에.. 지금 이게 달력 셀 ui인데..." (re: font added)
   - "Utils > Fonts 폴더에 넣어뒀구, 210 Gulim 070 => 210Gulim, 온글잎 밑미 => meetme, Yeongdeok Sea => yeongdeokSea로 바꾸고 싶어 이름. info.plist에도 등록하고 extension 만들어줘"
   - "이제 phase2-1 질문 답할까? 질문이 뭐였지?" (repeated)
   - [Phase 2-1 detailed specs message — the big spec message]

7. Pending Tasks:
   - **Phase 2-1 (In Progress)**: Implement calendar grid UI
     - `UI/Components/DotCircle.swift` — 5 circle states (recorded, future, missed, today overlay, preInstall)
     - `UI/Components/CalendarGrid.swift` — 7×5 or 7×6 grid + weekday header
     - `Features/Main/MainFeature.swift` — TCA reducer with month navigation, install date logic
     - `Features/Main/MainView.swift` — Full main screen layout
     - Update `Features/AppFeature/AppFeature.swift` — Wrap MainFeature
     - Update `Features/AppFeature/AppView.swift` — Scope to MainView
     - Update `DottonApp.swift` — Add TCA store back
   - **Phase 2-2**: Bottom note section
   - **Phase 3**: DiaryWrite screen (日記 작성 화면)
   - **Phase 3**: Implement real SwiftData in DiaryClient
   - **Phase 4**: Completion bottom sheet
   - **Phase 5**: Statistics screen
   - **Phase 6**: Polish (CoachMark, SnackBar)
   - **Phase 7**: Firebase Analytics
   - **Deferred**: Toast for future day tap (mentioned as separate phase)

8. Current Work:
   Implementing Phase 2-1 (calendar grid). The user provided detailed specs. The only file changed so far was updating `Date+Helpers.swift` to use Sunday-start `firstWeekdayOffset`:

   ```swift
   // Changed from Monday-start to Sunday-start
   var firstWeekdayOffset: Int {
       let weekday = Calendar.current.component(.weekday, from: startOfMonth)
       // Calendar.weekday: 1=일(Sun), 2=월(Mon), ..., 7=토(Sat)
       return weekday - 1
   }
   ```

   The following Phase 2-1 specs were provided (not yet implemented):
   - Circle size: 50×50, horizontal: no spacing, vertical: 16pt margin
   - **5 circle states**: recorded (MonthlyTheme color+text, meetme font 24), future (EDECE9 bg, date text BBBBBB, 210Gulim 18), missed (theme bg 40% opacity + dashed inner stroke theme color 70% + date text, 210Gulim 18), today (additional F58583 inner stroke 2.5pt), preInstall (same as recorded)
   - Weekday header: "일월화수목금토", 210Gulim 13, 일=C96458, 토=5476BA, 평일=A2A19F, 13pt below header text to grid
   - Month header: "N월" format, 210Gulim 20, black; icon_arrow_left/right (8×4); 20pt gap between text and arrows; year above month row 8pt, leading aligned with left arrow
   - Navigation: can't go before install month, can go +1 year forward
   - Top buttons: icon_statistics + icon_export, 20×20 icons in 38×38 white circle with shadow(0,1,4,8%)
   - Background: FAF8F5, top padding: 80pt

9. Optional Next Step:
   Continue Phase 2-1 implementation. Per the user's latest spec message, the next files to create/update are:
   - `UI/Components/DotCircle.swift` (DotState enum + DotCircle view)
   - `UI/Components/CalendarGrid.swift` (7×N grid + weekday header)
   - `Features/Main/MainFeature.swift` (TCA reducer)
   - `Features/Main/MainView.swift` (full layout per specs)
   - Update `AppFeature.swift`, `AppView.swift`, `DottonApp.swift` to wire TCA back in

   The user specified: "원의 크기: 50x50 / 가로: 마진 없이 딱 붙여서 / 세로: 16마진" and all circle states, weekday/month header specs, background color FAF8F5, and button layout. The `Date+Helpers.swift` Sunday-start change was the first step; the remaining implementation has not yet begun.

If you need specific details from before compaction (like exact code snippets, error messages, or content you generated), read the full transcript at: /Users/user/.claude/projects/-Users-user-Desktop-Dotton/8d447c48-c623-49ac-b918-9597042b694d.jsonl
Continue the conversation from where it left off without asking the user any further questions. Resume directly — do not acknowledge the summary, do not recap what was happening, do not preface with "I'll continue" or similar. Pick up the last task as if the break never happened.

file.content:
import SwiftUI

// MARK: - Cell 생성 헬퍼 (0-based gridIndex 자동 변환)

private func cell(
    _ index: Int,
    bg: String,
    text: String? = nil,
    textColor: String? = nil
) -> PixelArtCell {
    PixelArtCell(
        gridIndex: index - 1,
        backgroundColor: Color(hex: bg),
        textColor: textColor.map { Color(hex: $0) } ?? .clear,
        text: text,
        imageName: nil
    )
}

private func imageCell(_ index: Int, name: String) -> PixelArtCell {
    PixelArtCell(
        gridIndex: index - 1,
        backgroundColor: .clear,
        textColor: .clear,
        text: nil,
        imageName: name
    )
}

// MARK: - MonthlyTheme 데이터

extension MonthlyTheme {
    // 2026년 4월 ~ 2027년 3월
    static let all: [MonthlyTheme] = [
        april, may, june, july, august, september, october, november, december,
        january, february, march
    ]

    // MARK: 1월 (2027) - 새로움의 시작
    static let january = MonthlyTheme(
        year: 2027,
        month: 1,
        sentence: "새로움의 시작",
        emoji: "🌅",
        pictureTitle: "떠오르는 해",
        primaryColor: Color(hex: "F8C787"),
        secondaryColor: Color(hex: "3C6583"),
        pixelArtCells: [
            cell(1,  bg: "F8C787", text: "새", textColor: "F0974A"),
            cell(2,  bg: "F8C787", text: "로", textColor: "F0974A"),
            cell(3,  bg: "F8C787", text: "움", textColor: "F0974A"),
            cell(4,  bg: "F8C787", text: "의", textColor: "F0974A"),
            cell(5,  bg: "F8C787"),
            cell(6,  bg: "F8C787", text: "시", textColor: "F0974A"),
            cell(7,  bg: "F8C787", text: "작", textColor: "F0974A"),
            cell(8,  bg: "F8C787"),
            cell(9,  bg: "F8C787"),
            imageCell(10, name: "image_cell_jan_1"),
            cell(11, bg: "E44242"),
            imageCell(12, name: "image_cell_jan_2"),

<system-reminder>This is a side question from the user. You must answer this question directly in a single response.

IMPORTANT CONTEXT:
- You are a separate, lightweight agent spawned to answer this one question
- The main agent is NOT interrupted - it continues working independently in the background
- You share the conversation context but are a completely separate instance
- Do NOT reference being interrupted or what you were "previously doing" - that framing is incorrect

CRITICAL CONSTRAINTS:
- You have NO tools available - you cannot read files, run commands, search, or take any actions
- This is a one-off response - there will be no follow-up turns
- You can ONLY provide information based on what you already know from the conversation context
- NEVER say things like "Let me try...", "I'll now...", "Let me check...", or promise to take any action
- If you don't know the answer, say so - do not offer to look it up or investigate

Simply answer the question with the information you have.</system-reminder>

날짜에 해당하지 않는 원들 있잖아 (이전 달 or 다음달 해당 날) 이거는 그냥 앱 설치 이전 날들과 동일하게 처리해줘. 그리고 아직 탭 로직에 대해선 안 줬는데, 얘네는 탭해도 기록이 안되게 할거야

content.text:
확인했어. 요약하면:

- **빈 패딩 셀** (이전달/다음달 날짜 영역) → `preInstall` 상태와 동일한 비주얼
- 탭해도 아무 반응 없음 (일기 작성 진입 안 됨)

MainFeature에서 탭 액션 처리할 때 `gridIndex < firstWeekdayOffset` 이거나 `gridIndex >= firstWeekdayOffset + daysInMonth`인 경우는 그냥 무시하면 돼.
